definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="entity_push"><value name="x"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value><value name="y"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value><value name="z"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><next><block type="call_procedure"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="procedure">Cavesound</field><next><block type="wait"><value name="ticks"><block type="number_variable"><field name="variable">watchdog_crashtime</field><field name="config">CUSTOM:Config</field></block></value><statement name="do"><block type="call_procedure"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="procedure">Discard</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_variable"><field name="variable">crash</field><field name="config">CUSTOM:Config</field></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">System.err.println("[Server Watchdog] A single server tick took watchdogtime seconds (should be max 0.05)".replace("watchdogtime", "" + (double) ConfigConfiguration.WATCHDOG_CRASHTIME.get() / 20));</field><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">System.err.println("[Server Watchdog] Watching the server, this server is probably frozen");</field><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">throw new Error("Watchdog");</field></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
